title: Request Validation and Error Handling
description: Validate incoming data and send proper error responses.

slides.title: Why Validate? 🛡️
slides.content:
# Input Validation

Never trust user input. Validation ensures:
- Data integrity (required fields, correct types).
- Security (prevent injection, malformed data).
- Consistent error messages.

We can validate manually or use libraries like `express-validator`.

slides.title: Manual Validation Example
Using express-validator 📋
Centralized Error Handling 🎯

quizData.question: Which package is commonly used for request validation in Express?
quizData.explanation: `express-validator` is a popular middleware for validating request data.
